settings.title: USB-A Adapter Spacer — Breaking Barriers, Open Compatibility
settings.description: An adapter ring that mounts onto the front of the ARES base, featuring an integrated USB-A port and USB Refresher chip. Any USB-enabled wheel can connect through it to the ARES base’s main USB Hub, enabling true USB Passthrough. Designed not only for the CONSPIT ecosystem, but for the entire sim racing community — addressing cross-brand compatibility challenges between wheels and bases.

settings.title: Solving User Pain Points
settings.description:
No More Cable Drag: Wheel USB cables plug directly into the base front, rotating with the shaft — no tangling or loosening. Shorter, More Stable Connection: Port closer to the wheel allows short cables, ensuring power delivery and stable data transmission.
High Bandwidth Ready: Built-in USB Refresher keeps even high-data wheels (e.g., with SimHub screens) running smoothly.

settings.title: Open Ecosystem & Expansion
settings.description: Brand-Agnostic: Compatible with almost any third-party USB wheel on the market. Freedom of Choice: Mix and match wheels and CONSPIT bases without brand lock-in. Open Pathway: Direct USB Passthrough to the wheelbase provides stable bandwidth for future expansion.
